candidate_row.carrier_definition: complete route-node C distribution plus registered internal signed flux; no independent decay, age, memory, or susceptibility field

causal_mediation_contract.induced_geometry_causality_blocker: set_state intervention does not recompute constitutive dependent fields
causal_mediation_contract.later_local_readout_definition: prequeued node-1 to node-0 packet departure admitted only when native source coherence is at least the fixed readout packet amount
causal_mediation_contract.organization_intervention_definition: I4-admitted set_state control changes only route-node C: baseline clamp removes formed eligibility and formed-state restore rescues weakened eligibility

control_results.actual_result: forming packet is exhausted before persistence and progression
control_results.blocked_condition: forming activity remains live during the claimed persistence window
control_results.expected_result: forming packet exhausted before persistence is admitted

control_results.actual_result: progression and readout use distinct packet identities and times
control_results.blocked_condition: forming packet is reused as the later readout or progression packet
control_results.expected_result: forming packet identity is exhausted and excluded from later operations

control_results.actual_result: registered route mass is invariant while spatial coordinate weakens
control_results.blocked_condition: route-mass loss is relabeled as organization weakening
control_results.expected_result: route mass remains invariant while the selected coordinate changes

control_results.actual_result: pre-execution schedule authorship is explicit and post-formation call lists are empty
control_results.blocked_condition: an undisclosed producer update changes the positive trajectory
control_results.expected_result: all producer schedule ownership and post-formation calls are disclosed

control_results.actual_result: fixture pre-schedules the 1->2 weakening packet; native runtime executes conservation but does not select the transition
control_results.blocked_condition: the experiment fixture selects the weakening time, amount, route, and direction
control_results.expected_result: triggered condition must reject autonomous D0a weakening

control_results.actual_result: same queued native departure flips under C-only clamp/restore
control_results.blocked_condition: the reported local-C effect does not alter a native operation
control_results.expected_result: a matched C-only intervention changes native departure eligibility

control_results.actual_result: identity diff proves all non-intervened scientific paths equal
control_results.blocked_condition: node-scalar equality is presented as complete-state equality
control_results.expected_result: intervention identity diff is restricted to declared C paths

control_results.actual_result: temporal organization is not claimed or consumed
control_results.blocked_condition: derived timing annotation is relabeled as native temporal mediation
control_results.expected_result: control is outside the spatial-only candidate scope
control_results.scope_reason_if_not_applicable: I7 tests a spatial C-distribution candidate and makes no temporal claim

control_results.actual_result: all outcomes derive from source-current C, packet receipts, and native eligibility
control_results.blocked_condition: a semantic label substitutes for source-current state and native receipts
control_results.expected_result: all descriptive results derive from runtime state and receipts

the fixture owns weakening timing, amount, source, destination, and direction
native runtime owns conservative packet debit, in-flight state, and credit only
the direction matrix establishes conditional internal reorganization, not autonomous no-input relaxation

route_mass_contract.departure_arrival_accounting_policy: internal departure debit plus in-flight packet plus arrival credit counted once
route_mass_contract.in_flight_boundary_treatment: internal packets counted once while in flight; no boundary packet is scheduled
route_mass_contract.metric_measure_and_boundary_convention: fixed node support; node coherence plus route-internal in-flight packets; boundary edge 2 oriented from route node 2 toward outside node 3
route_mass_contract.receiver_inside_or_outside_support: formation, progression, and readout receivers are inside route support; outside progression remains on nodes 3 and 4

route_organization_contract.organization_definition: complete I4-admitted route C distribution and internal signed flux, with C1-C2 selected before execution as the weakening orientation

row_specific_thresholds_declared_before_.sign_or_orientation_ambiguity_resolution: orientation is frozen from the signed C1-C2 formation delta; absolute magnitude is not substituted after outcomes are observed
row_specific_thresholds_declared_before_.trajectory_rule: formation effect must persist through a disjoint event, then the predeclared internal-weakening row must reduce but not erase it
